seo.title: Verify Your Insurance — Free & Confidential | Des Moines Wellness Center
seo.description: Check your addiction treatment benefits in minutes. Free, 100% confidential insurance verification with no obligation. Most major private plans accepted.

hero.headline: Verify Your Insurance
hero.subhead: Find out what your plan covers in minutes — free, 100% confidential, and with no obligation to enroll. Complete the short form below or call us any time and our admissions team will handle the rest.

image.alt: An admissions specialist verifying insurance benefits at Des Moines Wellness Center.

sections.heading: Check Your Benefits
sections.subheading: It takes about a minute. We'll contact you with your coverage details.

sections.heading: Most Major Private Insurance Plans Accepted
body: We work directly with most major private insurance providers to maximize your benefits and minimize out-of-pocket costs. Don't see your plan? Call us — we'll check it for you.

sections.heading: Prefer to Talk It Through?
body: Our admissions specialists are available 24/7 to verify your benefits over the phone and answer any questions — confidentially and with no pressure.

images.alt: An admissions specialist verifying insurance benefits at Des Moines Wellness Center.
